Speech to Text: Can you please... Hey doctor, there is something in my head. Can you please tell me what it is?
Doctor's Response: With what I see, I think you have dandruff, a common skin condition characterized by flakes of dead skin on the scalp, it appears to be causing scaling and possibly itchiness on your scalp. I would suggest using an antifungal shampoo or a medicated shampoo containing ingredients such as zinc pyrithione or ketoconazole to help control the flaking and reduce inflammation.
